name: Highest Fame
rules: Buying fame is permitted
Contender must reside on Maple Island

name: Lowest Fame
rules: Buying defames is permitted
Contender must reside on Maple Island

name: Most Lemons
desc: Islanders who own the most lemons. (The only source of lemons on-island is the Mai's Training questline)
rules: Trading is permitted
Lemons may be stored on the contender's island mules
Contender must reside on Maple Island

name: Most Coolers Logged
desc: Islanders who cracked the most summer coolers and logged the results.
rules: Cooler openings must be documented by screenshots
Coolers opened on island mules and alts count toward total
Contender must reside on Maple Island

name: Most Chairs
desc: Islanders who own the greatest number of unique chairs.
rules: Donor chairs don't count toward total
Trading is permitted
Chairs may be stored on the contender's island mules
Contender must reside on Maple Island

name: Most Pig Heads
desc: Islanders who own the most pig heads.
rules: Trading is permitted
Heads may be stored on the contender's island mules
Contender must reside on Maple Island

name: Pink Bean's Birthday Challenge
rules: JQ may be completed on the contender's mule
Transformation items are permitted
Time is measured by in-game time given by the NPC
Contender must reside on Maple Island

name: Halloween Challenge
rules: JQ may be completed on the contender's mule
Transformation items are permitted
Time is measured by in-game time given by the NPC
Contender must reside on Maple Island

name: Damage Range (STRlander)
desc: Highest Damage Range for STRlanders (All AP in STR).
rules: Damage is ranked by max damage
Any gear is permitted (and gear can be borrowed)
Weather buffs are the only buffs permitted
Contender must reside on Maple Island

name: Damage Range (DEXlander)
desc: Highest Damage Range for DEXlanders (All AP in DEX).
rules: Damage is ranked by average of min and max damage
Any gear is permitted (and gear can be borrowed)
Weather buffs are the only buffs permitted
Contender must reside on Maple Island

name: Damage Range (INTlander)
desc: Highest Damage Range for INTlanders, Magelanders, and NoPointers (No AP in STR or DEX)
rules: Damage is ranked by average of min and max damage
Any gear is permitted (and gear can be borrowed)
Weather buffs are the only buffs permitted
Contender must reside on Maple Island
